name: LocalBooru
subtitle: Local image library with automatic tagging
description: Official AltStore source for LocalBooru — a local image library manager with optional AI-powered tagging.

apps.name: LocalBooru
apps.subtitle: Local image library with automatic tagging
apps.localizedDescription:
LocalBooru is a local image library manager. Browse, search, and organize your image collection with tag-based filtering. Connect to a desktop server for full library access, or use standalone on your device.

Features:
- Tag-based search and filtering
- QR code pairing with desktop server
- Collection management
- Watch history tracking
- Favorites and ratings

versions.localizedDescription: Initial v2 release with Rust backend.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Scan QR codes for server pairing
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Connect to servers on your local network
